title: crepidomanes dichotomum
intro: Crepidomanes dichotomum, also known as the forked maidenhair fern, is a species of epiphytic fern in the family Hymenophyllaceae. Traditionally, this plant is used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Crepidomanes dichotomum include reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing, as well as exhibiting potential antiviral and anticancer activities. In herbal preparations, the plant's fronds are often dried and used in teas, infusions, or decoctions to harness its medicinal properties.
